thesis: Stripe showed preliminary acquisition interest in late February 2026, but PayPal is not actively seeking a sale and remains independent, keeping a deal possible but unlikely near-term.
method: Probability estimated from recency and credibility of acquisition signals vs. counter-signals (no active sale process, company still independent as of mid-March 2026).

evidence.signal: PayPal stock surged ~7% on CNBC report that Stripe is weighing an acquisition of the payments platform
Semafor report states PayPal may not be actively seeking a sale, dampening acquisition narrative
PayPal remains independent publicly traded company; Stripe interest described as only preliminary
